Project Tempest uses the GPL Miles SDK compatibility stub from:
https://github.com/TheSuperHackers/miles-sdk-stub

Pinned commit: 6e32700d7ba4b4713a03bf1f5ffc3b0ac8d17264
Licence: GPL-3.0 (see GPL-3.0-LICENSE.md in the private demo package)

Build definition: cmake/miles.cmake target milesstub through the parent MSVC Win32 Release build in both Generals and GeneralsMD contexts.
Toolchain scope: Microsoft Visual C++ 2022 x86; CI uses GitHub Actions windows-2022 and pinned ilammy/msvc-dev-cmd action commit 0b201ec74fa43914dc39ae48a89fd1d8cb592756.
Deterministic compiler setting: /Brepro.
Deterministic linker settings: /Brepro and /PDBALTPATH:%_PDB%.
Binary verification: two isolated integrated Release builds must produce byte-identical mss32.dll files before packaging.
Hash record: the packager requires that proven SHA-256 explicitly and records it in package-manifest.json and SHA256SUMS.txt.

The compiled DLL hash is toolchain-context-dependent and is intentionally not treated as a portable source identity.
